ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined the platform */,
  "is_therapist" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is a therapist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* User's biography or description */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* User's privacy settings */,
  "notification_preferences" TEXT /* User's notification preferences */,
  "therapist_qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the therapist if the user is a therapist */,
  "therapist_availability" TEXT /* Availability of the therapist if the user is a therapist */,
  "therapist_specializations" TEXT /* Specializations of the therapist if the user is a therapist */,
  "user_rating" INTEGER /* User's rating based on interactions and contributions */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the question */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the question */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the question */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the question on the platform */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the question is posted anonymously */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the question (e.g., open, answered, closed) */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the question was posted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the question has received */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the question has received */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user who posted the question */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the question is posted */,
  "resolution_status" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the question has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" TEXT /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist who provided the answer */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the answer */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the answer was posted */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the answer has received */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the answer is posted anonymously */,
  "resolution_status" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the answer has resolved the user's issue */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the answer is provided */,
  "therapist_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the therapist by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_answers_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "upvotes" (
  "upvote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upvote */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the upvote */,
  "question_id" TEXT /* ID of the question the upvote is for (optional, can be null if upvoting an answer) */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer the upvote is for (optional, can be null if upvoting a question) */,
  "upvoted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the upvote was given */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user who gave the upvote (user or therapist) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the user when upvoting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upvote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_upvotes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "question_tags" (
  "question_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question-tag relationship */,
  "question_id" TEXT /* ID of the question */,
  "tag_id" TEXT /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_question_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who posted the comment */,
  "question_id" TEXT /* ID of the question the comment is for (optional, can be null if commenting on an answer) */,
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the answer the comment is for (optional, can be null if commenting on a question) */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "posted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_answer_id FOREIGN KEY ("answer_id") REFERENCES answers ("answer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapist_specializations" (
  "specialization_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each specialization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_therapist_specializations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
